author: paulobsf
description: Render a life-in-weeks (memento mori) calendar with work, life, and other planning phases, plus linked key events. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Paulo Ferreira
manifest.description: Render a life-in-weeks (memento mori) calendar with work, life, and other planning phases, plus linked key events.
manifest.name: Life Calendar

name: Life Calendar

releases.author: paulobsf
releases.description:
- Updated installation copy now that Life Calendar is available from Obsidian's Community Plugins directory.
- Removed the separate global Life Calendar view and ribbon action.
- Kept calendars explicit: each calendar is configured in a `life-calendar` code block inside a note.
- Kept **Life Calendar: Insert life calendar block** and expanded the inserted starter block with example phases and optional event/category examples.
- Simplified plugin settings to global defaults only:
  - age label interval
  - decade spacing
  - vault-backed event frontmatter field names
- Cleaned up obsolete settings/view code and related CSS.
releases.name: Life Calendar 1.0.1

releases.author: paulobsf
releases.description: Initial release of Life Calendar for Obsidian. Includes a life-in-weeks calendar with planning phases, category filtering, and linked events.
releases.name: Life Calendar 1.0.0
